message:
chore: close coding_agent_session_search-amne (lazy loading verified)

Lazy Conversation Loading & Memory Management already implemented:
- LRU cache (MAX_LOADED_CONVERSATIONS: 5)
- On-demand message loading
- Memory warnings + monitoring
- WASM cleanup (stmt.free())
- Virtual scrolling for large conversations
